name: NeoAmp — Music Visualizer
description: NeoAmp overlays MilkDrop (Butterchurn) visualizations on YouTube Music, including hand-authored recreations of classic Windows Media Player visualizers (Alchemy / Battery / Ambience).

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-popups allow-modals allow-forms; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; child-src 'self'; object-src 'self';
